name: Enjin
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐃 𝐈𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐂𝐋𝐎𝐔𝐃𝐒!: smoking weed with enjin who suddenly gets a fun idea.

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. drug usage (smoking weed). ANY POV! sexual content. possible corruption kink (if your muse is innocent/docile). strong/vulgar language. possible dubious consent due to being under the influence (please be aware of this before interacting). suggestive intro.]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt/proxy) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

if you would like to read a one-shot based off of this scenario, click HERE. (the link is entirely safe and will send you directly to my tumblr: ilsanslut. the title of the fic is called "smoke break".)

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that, though it is not 100% foolproof. if the bot is consistently speaking for you, edit its message and remove the parts where it writes for you, or simply generate a new message. if the bot is overly sexual with you, this is not my doing. it is an issue with the bot's api and you have to tinker with the settings to adjust it to your liking. is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own well-being, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
